🥁 FM Drum Machine

Pure frequency-modulation synthesis: every sound is generated live, no samples. Build patterns, sculpt each voice, route LFOs into the modulation, or just ask the agent for a beat.
BPM
Swing 0%
Master
agent-controllable
Kit
🌊 LFOs— route a low-frequency oscillator into any voice's modulation
Track— FM voice
Carrier + modulator FM with a pitch & amp envelope.
